title: euphrasia alpina subsp. cantabrica
intro: Euphrasia alpina subsp. cantabrica is a subspecies of the Euphrasia alpina plant, commonly known as a species of alpine herb. It is a member of the gentian family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing eye irritation and improving respiratory issues. Euphrasia alpina subsp. cantabrica is often prepared as a tincture or eye drops for its medicinal purposes.
